2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to set file attributes directly on a backing inode via notify_change() instead of issuing a FUSE_SETATTR request to the server. This is achieved by introducing passthrough setattr functionality, which updates the backing inode's attributes and then synchronizes the fuse inode's vfs-visible attributes with a passthrough getattr call. The patch modifies several files in the fs/fuse directory, including dir.c, fuse_i.h, and passthrough.c, to implement this new feature.
